text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hiya, I'm Maruzensky. I'm stoked to meet you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know that sweet feeling you get when the
wind blows on your face as you run? That always
gets me real jazzed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna crank my speed up like a supercar, so
make sure you're watching closely! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
